title: SeaMorn 30Pcs Cat Molar Sticks, Cat Toys, Cat Catnip toys, Natural Matatabi Silvervine Chew Sticks, Teeth Grinding Chew toys for Cat, Dental Catnip Toys for Cat Kitten
features: ❤ NATURAL AND HEALTHY - The Catnip sticks are made up natural and pure material. Without additives or preservatives, healthy and safe for your pets. It also helps to relieve your cat’s stress and stabilize blood pressure, make your cat feel calm and relaxed.

❤ HIGH POTENCY - For 80% types of cats, kittens and adults. High potency ensures that your cats will love it. Your cat will be strongly attracted by it, reactions like chewing, rubbing, licking, rolling, running, purring and extreme cuteness.

❤ NATURAL TOOTH CARE - Natural dental care for playful healthy teeth, teeth cleaning & gums! Facilitates dental hygiene and oral care for cats through exfoliating dental plaque build-ups on molars, canines and incisors. It also help the cat promote exercise and gastrointestinal motility.

❤ DURABLE FRESHNESS REUSABLE - Cat matatabi sticks resealable ecological packaging ensures that you stay cool for every use. After the cat has played with the sticks, you can cut the gnawed part and save the rest in the package. Use moderately, no more than 3 times a week.
❤ CUSTOMER SERVICE - SeaMorn is committed to providing each customer with the best quality products and the highest standard services. Any problem, just contact us via amazon message.
description: Product Description WHAT IS MATATABI? WHAT ARE MATATABI CHEW STICKS? Matatabi is the Japanese name for silver vine. Silver vine originally comes from Asia and grows there in the mountain forests of China, Japan and Korea. It has been one of the most popular cat toys for centuries and, unlike catnip and valerian, contains a mixture of different scents, all of which have an attractive and positive effect on our domestic cats. Scientific studies of cat stimulants showed that 1 in 3 cats do not react to catnip however 8 in 10 cats DO react to silvervine. Moreover, 75% of cats who did NOT respond to catnip had a positive reaction to silvervine! So regardless of whether or not your cat enjoys catnip, silvervine is the perfect alternative to catnip to try. Even if your cat does love catnip, they likely will have a different reaction to silvervine as well! Matatabi Chew Sticks are one of the most unique all natural cat toys you can get for your own cat or as a gift for another kitty. They are a wonderful alternative to catnip that combines both play and dental health. Matatabi Sticks are cut from all natural sections of vine of the silvervine plant and contain natural oils that cats are attracted to just like catnip. You gently rub off some bark of the stick to release the scents then give to your cat to enjoy. Many cats will gnaw and chew on the Matatabi stick either by themselves or with you holding it. It acts just like a natural toothbrush and is a safe alternative for your cat to chew on instead of wires, plastic, or anything else they find laying around. HOW DOES MATATABI AFFECT CATS? HOW DOES MATATABI AFFECT CATS? Before & After Young cats love them and it saves them chewing other items. I can throw these or tie them on a elastic string. They carry them around to chew or play with them wherever they like. I think it stops them chewing other things and they seem to like them. Catnip sticks to keep cats teeth clean My kittens and grown cats love to chew on these. My cat loved it! Great cat toy! Package just arrived. Next day delivery. My cat approved it. He is in such a good mood right now Im kinda jealous
